extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - 120+ scrapers, Stremio, Trakt, Debrid, Live Movie Channels
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 120+ scrapers providing maximum coverage for movies and TV shows.
=== DIRECT STREAM SITES (NEW v2.9.14, No-Streamtape) === - Archive.org (public-domain MP4), Cineby, VidFast, RiveStream - UiraLive, NetMirror, VidBinge, HollyMovieHD All return direct MP4 / M3U8 via JSON APIs — no embed hosters.
=== FREE STREAMS (No Debrid Required) === - VidSrc Network: VidSrc.xyz, VidSrc.cc, VidSrc.in, VidSrc.pm, VidSrc.nl, VidSrc.pro, VidSrc.me, VidSrc.to - Embed Services: 2Embed, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay, MoviesAPI, SmashyStream - Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, 123Movies, MoviesJoy, Putlocker - And 40+ more free streaming sources!
=== STREMIO FREE ADDONS === - Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - KnightCrawler, Jackettio, AIOStreams, Torrentio (Free Mode) - PlutoTV, Tubi, and more!
=== TORRENT SITES === - Primary: EZTV, ThePirateBay, SolidTorrents - Secondary: LimeTorrents, Torrentz2, RARBG, Kickass, TorrentDownload - Additional: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, and more!
=== ANIME === - Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe - Nyaa, SubsPlease, AnimeTosho, and more!
=== ASIAN DRAMA === - WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad
=== INTERNATIONAL === - Russian: RuTracker, RuTor, NNM-Club - Chinese: BTBTT - French: Torrent9
=== STREMIO DEBRID SCRAPERS === - Torrentio, EasyNews+
=== FEATURES === - Live Movie Channels with EPG (35+ channels) - Episode Countdown Tracker - Network Browser (Netflix, HBO, BBC, etc.) - Returning Shows (New Seasons) - AI-Powered Natural Language Search - Trakt Integration with Scrobbling - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Put.io - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration - Pre-scrape on Hover - Source Caching
Revived and massively expanded by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
NOTE (v2.9.21): All scrapers now live in a separate Kodi script module, "Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources" (script.module.salts_scrapers), authored by Zeus768. It is auto-installed as a dependency.
extension.news:
v2.9.54 (2026-01) - MEDIAFIRE: PUBLIC FOLDER MODE - MediaFire closed public developer self-signup years ago, so the old email + password + app_id + api_key flow only works for legacy accounts. SALTS now uses MediaFire's anonymous public-folder API instead - no developer account, no app, no signature required. * Settings -> Cloud -> MediaFire -> "Add MediaFire Public Folder": paste a https://www.mediafire.com/folder/<KEY>/Name link (folder must be shared "Anyone with the link"). SALTS walks every file and subfolder via /folder/get_content.php anonymously. * Add as many public folders as you like; each is stored in special://profile/addon_data/plugin.video.salts/mediafire_folders.json * "Remove a MediaFire Folder" lets you drop one or all of them. * Direct-download URLs are resolved via /file/get_links.php (no auth needed for files inside a public folder). - Settings panel for MediaFire simplified: no more app_id, api_key, email or password fields. Just enable + add folder(s).
v2.9.53 (2026-01) - FOUR NEW CLOUD PROVIDERS - Added: pCloud (full account browsing). * Settings -> Cloud -> pCloud: pick region (global / EU), enter email + password, press "Authorize pCloud". The addon stores a persistent auth token, walks every folder from root, and indexes all videos for the SALTS smart library. * Direct streaming (host + path resolved via /getfilelink) and public share links (via /getfilepublink) for debrid push. - Added: MediaFire (full account browsing). * Requires a free Application ID + API Key from https://www.mediafire.com/developers/ (Apps Manager -> Create App). Setup guide button included in Settings -> Cloud -> MediaFire. * Email + password + app credentials -> session token, then walks every folder under "myfiles" via /folder/get_content.php. * Direct download URLs via /file/get_links.php for streaming and normal_download URLs for debrid push. - Added: Sync.com - shared-link mode. Sync.com is zero-knowledge encrypted so there is no account-listing API; instead paste any number of public Sync.com share links into Settings -> Cloud -> Sync.com. SALTS resolves each link page to the direct file URL (when the link is unprotected) or hands the share URL off to the selected debrid service. - Added: iDrive - same shared-link mode as Sync.com (iDrive is a backup product without a streaming API). - Cloud library scan_all() now sweeps all six providers (Google Drive, MEGA, pCloud, MediaFire, Sync.com, iDrive) in one pass with a single progress dialog. - Cloud library get_stream_url / get_share_url dispatch the new providers so playback and send-to-debrid work end-to-end from the Plex-style movies / TV / recently-added views.
v2.9.52 (2026-01) - CONTEXT MENU HARDENING - Trakt watchlist toggle now uses this fork's real TraktAPI surface (get_watchlist / add_to_watchlist / remove_from_watchlist) with the correct plural media_type ('movies' / 'shows') and the proper payload shape [{ids: {tmdb: <id>}}]. It is now a TRUE toggle that checks current membership before deciding to add or remove. - New: TMDB local cache. All TMDB lookups inside the SALTS Info / Cast / Similar / Trailers window are cached for 7 days at special://profile/addon_data/<addon>/tmdb_cache/, keyed by endpoint + sorted query params. Re-opening a title is instant. - New context menu items on every movie/show: * Trakt: Mark Watched / Unwatched (true toggle via /sync/history) * Trakt: Rate (1-10) (posts to /sync/ratings) * Refresh Metadata Cache (drops local TMDB cache for the title) * Play + Continue with Similar (movies only) - plays the title via the normal sources flow, then auto-opens the SALTS Info window for the top-rated similar title when playback ends. Binge mode! - Trakt errors are now logged + surfaced as a clear notification instead of failing silently.
v2.9.31 (2026-01) - QR DIALOG FULL-SCREEN BACKDROP - Fix: black backdrop on the TorBox auth dialog and Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi) dialog now truly fills the whole screen on every skin (was leaving the underlying view visible around the edges).
v2.9.30 (2026-01) - QR DIALOG FIXES - TorBox auth dialog now renders on a solid-black PNG backdrop (no more transparency / poster bleed-through behind the QR). - Buy Me a Beer (Ko-fi) is now a compact split-pane dialog with the QR on the right and text on the left, on a black backdrop. - Bundled art/black.png + art/white.png for reliable rendering across all skins.
v2.9.29 (2026-01) - PUT.IO DEBRID SERVICE - Added: Put.io as a 5th debrid backend, alongside Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid and TorBox. Magnet links submitted from the source dialog can now resolve to a direct streaming URL via your Put.io account. * New settings under Settings -> Debrid Services -> Put.io: - "Enable Put.io" - "OAuth Token" (paste from https://app.put.io/oauth -> Settings -> API -> Create application -> copy OAuth Token) - "Keep resolved torrents in Put.io cloud" (default OFF - the transfer + file are deleted from your Put.io drive once playback has started, mirroring the TorBox behaviour) - "Auto-play uncached torrents on Put.io" (default ON) + "Max wait for uncached torrents (minutes)" slider (1..30, default 10) - if the magnet isn't cached on Put.io, SALTS shows a background progress dialog with percent / speed / seeds while Put.io fetches the torrent, then plays it. * New "Put.io" entry in the SALTS Debrid Services menu - opens a status dialog (User / Email / Plan expiry / disk usage) once authorised, with Re-authorize / Revoke actions. * Note: Put.io does NOT expose an "instant cache" lookup API, so cached torrents are NOT pre-flagged in the source list the way RD/PM/AD/TorBox cached torrents are. Resolve still works for both cached (instant) and uncached (waits) torrents.
v2.9.27 (2026-01) - KNABEN AGGREGATOR + RD/AD PERFORMANCE - Added: Knaben scraper (https://api.knaben.org). Single API call surfaces results from 1337x, TPB, RuTracker, Nyaa, TGx and ~30 other public trackers, sorted by seeders. No setup or key required. Setting: Aggregators -> "Enable Knaben" (default ON). - Real-Debrid: resolve now picks the file matching the requested S/E for TV shows (instead of the largest file, which sometimes fetched a wrong/extra episode) and prefers that link first when unrestricting. Cuts wrong-episode playback to near zero on packs. - AllDebrid: resolve rewritten - flattens nested folder responses properly, picks S/E match for TV (else largest video), fixed a crash when AD returned files with size=None, removed a stray debug log line. Both RD and AD now accept the same (title, season, episode) kwargs as TorBox.
v2.9.26 (2026-01) - DEAD TORRENT FILTER + QR DIALOG REWRITE - Added: dead-torrent filter. Torrents with 0 (or fewer than "Minimum seeders") seeders are dropped from the source list before you ever click them, so the debrid resolver doesn't hang trying to fetch a magnet nobody is sharing. Cached debrid torrents are exempt (the debrid server already has the files - seeders don't matter). Direct / free hoster sources are exempt (no seed count). * New setting: Advanced -> "Filter dead torrents (no/low seeders)" (default ON). * New setting: Advanced -> "Minimum seeders" slider (range 0..50, default 1). - Fixed: TorBox device-code QR code displayed a blank/dim screen because the old implementation layered an OK dialog on top of Kodi's full-screen picture viewer, hiding the QR. Replaced with a custom split-pane dialog: SMALLER QR on the LEFT, full instructions (URL + code) on the RIGHT, both visible at the same time. Press OK or Back to close.
v2.9.25 (2026-01) - STRICT TITLE MATCH + TORBOX UNCACHED RESOLVE - Fixed: source list sometimes showed torrents belonging to a different movie or a different episode (e.g. "Saw X" appearing under "Saw", S02E03 appearing under S02E01). Scraper results whose filename does not match the requested title/year (movie) or S/E (TV) are now dropped before the dialog is shown. Direct-stream / free sources are not filtered (they're scraped per-TMDB id and already accurate). * New setting: Advanced -> "Strict title match" (default ON). * If the filter removes every result the un-filtered list is shown as a safety net so exotic titles still surface sources. - Fixed: TorBox could not play uncached torrents — the resolver bailed after ~6s because uncached items aren't ready instantly. TorBox can download uncached torrents server-side; SALTS now optionally waits for that with a real progress dialog (download %, speed, seeds). * New setting: TorBox -> "Resolve uncached torrents on TorBox (waits for download)" (default OFF — keeps the old fast-fail behaviour for users on Free plans). * New setting: TorBox -> "Max wait for uncached torrents (minutes)" (1..30, default 5). User can press Cancel at any time; on cancel the torrent is removed from the TorBox cloud.
v2.9.24 (2026-05) - TORBOX DEVICE CODE + QR - Authorize TorBox now lets you pick how to sign in: "Device Code" (recommended - uses TorBox's official /user/auth/device endpoints, shows a code and optional QR you can scan with your phone) or "API Key" (paste from torbox.app/settings, unchanged). - The device-code flow shows a cancellable progress dialog while it polls TorBox, supports the server's interval/expiry, and validates the returned token before saving. - Existing TorBox status menu (Plan / Email / Expiry) is preserved - pick "Re-authorize" to switch methods.
v2.9.21 (2026-02) - SCRAPERS EXTRACTED INTO SEPARATE MODULE - All 120+ scrapers have been moved out of plugin.video.salts and into their own standalone Kodi script module: script.module.salts_scrapers ("Salts Scrapers - Scrape All The Sources", author Zeus768). - plugin.video.salts no longer ships the scrapers/ folder; it now imports every source from the new module. Behaviour is identical for end users - Kodi auto-installs script.module.salts_scrapers as a dependency. - Benefit: scrapers can now be updated, forked and re-used independently from the SALTS front-end addon. - No settings changes - all per-scraper toggles continue to live in SALTS Settings exactly as before.
v2.9.13 (2026) - ZEUS RESOLVERS + PLANETSCRAPERS + TORRENTS REVIVED - Added: zeus_resolvers - built-in non-debrid hoster regex resolvers (Streamtape, DoodStream/d000d, DDownload/ddl.to, MixDrop, OK.ru, YouTube via Piped, KrakenFiles, plus a generic /embed/ scraper). Wired into the playback path BEFORE and AFTER ResolveURL so free hosts play even when ResolveURL's HEAD-verify pass drops them. - Added: PlanetScrapers aggregator - bundles Torrentio (IMDB) plus PirateBay, RARBG, TorrentGalaxy and 1337x text-search under one SALTS scraper entry (salts_lib/planet_scrapers.py). - Revived: 1337x, YTS, TorrentGalaxy, Movie4K, PrimeWire scrapers (previously purged in 2.9.10). Re-registered in ALL_SCRAPERS with per-scraper _enabled settings. - Fixed: HLS / m3u8 streams now forward Referer / User-Agent pipe headers to inputstream.adaptive via stream_headers and manifest_headers so manifest sub-requests no longer 403. - Fixed: Bones custom resolver still runs first for Streamtape / LuluVid / DDownload hosts; zeus_resolvers is the next fallback before ResolveURL, with a last-ditch generic embed-page scrape.
v2.9.11 (2026) - RENAME CHAINS -> BONES 2 - Renamed: "TheChains Bones Shows" -> "Bones 2 Shows" - Renamed: "TheChains Wrestling" -> "Bones 2 Wrestling" Setting IDs kept (thechains_bones_shows_enabled / thechains_wrestl_enabled) so existing toggles carry over.
v2.9.10 (2026) - DEAD SCRAPER PURGE + ZEUS REMOVED - Removed: Zeus Resolvers integration (zeus_hook + optional require) until upstream resolver issues are fixed. - Changed: Bones / TheChains / Streamtape / LuluVid / DDownload links now resolve through ResolveURL ONLY. No debrid required for these hosts; the Bones custom resolver still runs first as a shortcut. - Removed: 20 dead/blocked scrapers identified from logs (Movie4K, PrimeWire, YTS, TorrentGalaxy, 1337x, PeerFlix, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix, GLODLS, iDope, BTDigg, TorrentProject, AcgTorrent, AniDex, Annatar, EtHD, YggTorrent, DyTT, MagnetDL). Settings entries cleaned up to match.
v2.9.8 (2026) - STABILITY + FREE WRESTLING & BONES SHOWS - Fixed: Scrapers no longer hang past the 30s global timeout. The ThreadPoolExecutor now cancels pending futures on timeout so slow providers don't keep logging errors after the run ends. - Fixed: TorLock URL-join bug that produced malformed URLs like "https://www.torlock2.comhttp://..." and caused DNS/hang errors. Absolute hrefs are now respected and off-domain links are skipped. - Fixed: SubsPlease "'list' object has no attribute 'items'" crash when the API returns an empty list for no-hit searches. - Tightened: Default per-request HTTP timeout lowered 30s -> 15s so a single dead host can't eat the whole scrape budget. - Added: TheChains Bones Shows scraper — free direct Streamtape streams for the non-shows/classic TV catalog (V, Buck Rogers, Bangkok Hilton, Henry IX, etc). Handles nested MAIN DIR -> SEASON X navigation. - Added: TheChains Wrestling scraper — free direct streams for WWE, AEW, NXT, Main Event, Dynamite, WrestleMania, Hall of Fame, etc. - Added: Settings toggles under Free Streams: * thechains_bones_shows_enabled (default on) * thechains_wrestl_enabled (default on)
v2.9.5 (2026) - butterbeansrstop ENHANCEMENTS - Added: Settings toggle "butterbeansrstop (srstop.link)" under Settings -> Streaming Sites (default on). - Added: Optional srstop.link username / password fields - when set, the scraper maintains a logged-in cookie jar (persisted to the addon profile) so login-gated embed URLs are revealed. - Added: Cloudflare-bypass toggle (default on) - when urllib receives a 403/503 CF challenge, the scraper transparently retries through cloudscraper if the module is available. - Added: Direct-URL capture - when the logged-in site exposes an href / data-link on the embed-selector, the scraper returns that URL so ResolveURL can resolve it directly instead of opening the page.
v2.9.4 (2026) - NEW SCRAPER: butterbeansrstop (srstop.link) - Added: butterbeansrstop scraper targeting srstop.link (TV shows only). - Parses the site's embed-selector list on episode pages to extract hoster name (luluvdo, doodstream, etc.) and quality (1080p / 720p / SD) from the vris* class markers. - Uses direct slug guessing first, then the site's /index.php?menu=search query as a fallback so it works without a site login for discovery. - Registered under the "streaming_sites" category, TV-only.
v2.9.1 (2026) - PUNCHPLAY.TV INTEGRATION - Added: PunchPlay.tv as a parallel tracker alongside Trakt. Scrobble start/pause/stop + mark-watched now mirror to your PunchPlay account whenever Trakt scrobbling fires (both can be enabled independently). - Added: Device-code login flow - open Settings -> PunchPlay, press "Login to PunchPlay", visit the URL shown, enter the code. - Added: New top-level "PunchPlay" menu with status/toggle/login/logout. - Added: New Settings -> PunchPlay category: * Enable PunchPlay scrobbling * Mark watched on PunchPlay (end of playback) * Mirror Trakt "mark watched" actions to PunchPlay * Backend URL (advanced - defaults to https://punchplay.tv) - Note: PunchPlay's non-scrobble API (watchlist, lists, calendar, etc.) is not publicly documented, so SALTS continues to use Trakt for browsing those lists. PunchPlay receives a full watch history from your scrobbles.
v2.9.0 (2026-02) - MORE STREAMTAPE / LULUVDO SOURCES - Added 10 NEW site-scrape scrapers that visit independent movie/TV sites and extract any Streamtape / LuluVdo iframe found on the watch page: * Goku.sx, GokuTV.net (multi-server streaming) * Putlockers.fm (streamtape mirrors) * MyFlixerz.to (streamtape / luluvdo servers) * FMovies24.to (streamtape / luluvdo embeds) * Soaper.live (TV shows, alt servers) * HDToday.cc (multi-server, streamtape mirror) * Flixtor.video (streamtape & luluvdo alt-servers) * MoviesJoy.plus (per-title streamtape mirrors) * French-Stream.lol (FR; off by default) - Added DuckDuckGo HTML fallback search (opt-in, off by default) - last-resort hunt for Streamtape/LuluVdo embeds when curated sites don't cover the title. - Every URL produced flows through the existing bones_resolver, so each Streamtape / LuluVdo embed is auto-converted to a direct mp4 / m3u8 link that plays in Kodi without ResolveURL. - New per-source toggles in Settings -> Free Streams. - No additional thechains24 endpoints used; Bones still uses only its original single feed URL.
v2.8.9 (2026-01-20) - BONES & SCRAPER DISPATCH FIX - Fixed: Bones scraper was skipped when no debrid service was configured (main cause of "no sources / everything erroring" reports). Bones now runs in free mode alongside VidSrc/2Embed/etc. - Fixed: Bones title matching was too loose (e.g. common words matched every movie). Now requires exact or full word-set match plus year tolerance. - Fixed: Bones year is now extracted from the stream filename so "Saw" (2004) does not collide with "Saw X" (2023), etc. - Fixed: Streamtape resolver now handles all current obfuscation patterns and all streamtape mirror domains (streamtape.to/.net/.cc/streamta.pe, etc.). - Fixed: `get_sources` dispatcher now recognizes any scraper exposing `is_free = True` and is resilient to scrapers using the legacy `search(query, media_type)` signature. - Improved: scraper-side exceptions are now logged at WARNING instead of DEBUG so they show up in kodi.log for easier diagnosis. - Added: `bones_enabled` setting so Bones can be toggled from Settings.
v2.8.0 (2026-01-15) - MASSIVE SCRAPER EXPANSION - Added: 75+ NEW SCRAPERS bringing total to 120+ sources! - Added: VidSrc Network (8 mirrors): xyz, cc, in, pm, nl, pro, me, to - Added: 2Embed variants, Embed.su, AutoEmbed, MultiEmbed, VidLink, VidPlay - Added: MoviesAPI, SmashyStream, NontonGo, RgShorts/RiveStream - Added: Stremio Free Addons: Braflix, StreamingCommunity, TheMovieArchive, PublicDomainMovies - Added: KnightCrawler, Jackettio, Orionoid, TPBPlus, AIOStreams, StremThru, MediaFlow - Added: Torrentio Free Mode, PlutoTV, Tubi integration - Added: 20+ Streaming Sites: FlixHQ, BFlix, HDToday, Soap2Day, LookMovie, FMovies, etc. - Added: Additional Torrents: BitSearch, TorLock, TorrentFunk, TorrentsCSV, YggTorrent, Torrent9 - Added: 12+ Anime Sources: Zoro, 9Anime, GogoAnime, AniWave, HiAnime, AnimePahe, etc. - Added: Asian Drama: WatchAsian, KissAsian, DramaCool, ViewAsian, AsianLoad - Improved: Settings organized by category for easier management - Improved: Source discovery with parallel scraping support
v2.7.2 (2026-01-12) - Added: Movie Schedules - View what's playing on all movie channels for the next 12 hours - Added: Force Refresh EPG button in Movie Channels menu - Added: Returning Shows - Browse TV shows with new seasons starting in next 30 days - Added: Network Browser - Browse TV shows by network (Netflix, HBO, BBC, Amazon, Disney+, Apple TV+, and 20+ more) - Added: Episode Countdown - Track your favorite shows and see days until next episode - Added: Context menu "Track Episode Countdown" on all TV shows - Added: TODAY/TOMORROW/X days countdown indicators - Improved: EPG now shows unique movies per channel based on genre
v2.7.1 (2026-01-12) - Fixed: EPG now shows unique movies for each channel (no more duplicate listings) - Fixed: Each movie channel pulls from TMDB based on genre (Action, Comedy, Thriller, etc.) - Added: Channel logos/icons for all 35+ movie channels - Added: New Preferences settings category - Added: "Show International Premieres" setting - toggle Japanese, Chinese, Korean shows - Changed: Latest Show Premieres now defaults to English/American shows only - Added: Country indicators on international show premieres when enabled
v2.7.0 (2026-01-10) - Added: Live Movie Channels with EPG support (35+ channels worldwide) - Added: EPG integration showing current and next programs - Added: Watch Live or Start from Beginning choice for channels - Added: New Episodes Today calendar (scroll back up to 7 days) - Added: Latest Show Premieres with infinite pagination (50 items/page, last 7 days) - Added: Smart movie stream finding when clicking on live channels
